mood: Maximum clarity and accessibility — bold, direct, and uncompromising
designRules: Maintain WCAG AAA contrast ratios throughout the entire design
Red accent is reserved for critical actions and important callouts only
Flat design with no shadows — use borders and spacing for hierarchy
Large readable type with generous line-height for accessibility
Avoid decorative elements that reduce clarity or add visual noise

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-surface rounded-xl p-6 border border-text/10 shadow-sm">
designPatterns.button: <a className="bg-primary text-background font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="border border-text/20 text-text font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-surface transition">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl font-bold text-text tracking-tight">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="text-xs font-medium text-text-muted bg-surface rounded-full px-3 py-1">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full border border-text/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/30 transition" />
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="h-12 w-12 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
